title: Validation gate: smoke on the real Target-role page
userStory: As the developer, I want a smoke that ingests the Target-role page and exercises all three reads so that Phase 1 is provably working before anything else is built on it.
acceptanceCriteria: A script/test ingests the real Target-role Notion URL via POST /ingest
Asserts recall('locations Steve is open to' or similar) returns the page chunk with a sensible score
Asserts profile(the page's path) returns assembled text containing known page content (e.g. 'fully remote', 'fintech')
Asserts map(parent scope) lists exactly the one ingested source
The script documents how to run it (env: NOTION_TOKEN, PG_DSN, Voyage key)
This is the Phase 1 gate: the phase is not done until this smoke passes end-to-end
